claim_boundary: Development-only aggregate EHR forecasting diagnostics are descriptively compared with exact finite known-construction policy diagnostics. This is not causal evidence, independent generalization, treatment benefit, clinical utility, deployment readiness, or real-EHR policy superiority.
ehr_surface: KDD098R development-only factual logged-action world-model validation
known_value_surface: KDD-ADAPT01 exact adaptive finite benchmark with independently retrained architectures

metric_contract.ehr_recursive_error: mean normalized observed-cell RMSE across all logged-action recursive horizons and shared EHR seeds
metric_contract.known_value_policy_regret: mean exact regret across H1/H4/H8, support-constrained and uncertainty-penalized variants, and three independently retrained shared seeds
metric_contract.known_value_model_exploitation: mean absolute learned-model predicted-value minus exact true-value gap across the same planner rows
metric_contract.ehr_uncertainty_calibration: mean recursive mean absolute coverage error across shared EHR seeds
metric_contract.planner_stability: mean across planner/variant contracts of the standard deviation of exact true value over three independently retrained shared seeds; unavailable for the single derived ensemble surface
metric_contract.ehr_factual_action_information: mean matched-shuffle comparator-minus-observed RMSE on reward-relevant features across shared EHR seeds
metric_contract.known_value_policy_discrimination: mean across known-value seeds of the within-family range of exact true values over planner/horizon/variant rows
metric_contract.rank_concordance: Spearman correlation between within-task family rank by lower EHR recursive RMSE and lower known-value mean exact regret

known_value_retraining_receipt: KDD-BRIDGE01 retrains the KDD098R hidden/latent capacities and the frozen 40-epoch, conditional uniform 80-epoch validation-selection protocol separately in every known-value task and shared seed. No EHR-trained weights are reused.
ensemble_mapping_receipt: The EHR Gaussian transition ensemble and bridge Gaussian recurrent ensemble are each one separately derived three-member surface labeled 3408;3411;3414. Neither is treated as three independent ensemble repetitions.
